case_title: BUTIER, ROBERT L. JR. VS KUMAR, DILIP et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUTIER, ROBERT L. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT KUMAR, DILIP PATEL, RAMILA D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUMAR, DILIP

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-12-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-16-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 MOTION TO CONTINUE MADE BY SADHIR PATEL FOR DEFTS DUE TO DEFT GOING TO INDIA FOR A WEDDING.OBJECTION BY PLTF;MOTION DENIED.PARTIES AGREED TO SETTLE MATTER INFORMALLY.CASE CONTINUED IF NOT SETTLED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTIER, ROBERT L. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUMAR, DILIP PATEL, RAMILA D. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, RAMILA D.
